name: The Sons of Velmorn
inspire: After a friendly fighter's successful Attack, Inspire the attacker and each friendly fighter that was adjacent to the target when the Attack roll was made.

reactions.name: Deadly Command
reactions.flavorText: The cursed crown King Velmorn wears grants him great control over his full-blooded sons.
reactions.rulesText:
Use this immediately after your leader ({icon:leader}) uses a Core ability. Give that fighter a command token.

While your leader ({icon:leader}) has any command tokens, each time you make an Attack roll for a friendly Grave Guard ({icon:minion}), your leader ({icon:leader}) is treated as being adjacent to the target.

reactions.name: Raise Shields!
reactions.flavorText: Velmorn's people were famed for their drill and the strength of their shieldwalls. Little has changed.
reactions.rulesText: Use this immediately after an enemy fighter's Attack if the target was a friendly bulwark ({icon:shield}) and the Save roll contained any {icon:crit}. Give that friendly fighter a Guard token.

reactions.name: The Velmorn Curse
reactions.flavorText: Woe betide those who would harm the House of Velmorn, for a dread curse clings to their ancient bones…
reactions.rulesText: Use this immediately after a friendly fighter is slain by an attacker adjacent to them. Inflict 1 damage on the attacker. You can only use this ability once per game.

abilities.name: Rise Again
abilities.flavorText: Velmorn's heirs must fight eternally in his name.
abilities.rulesText: You can use this ability in your Power step if your leader ({icon:leader}) is on the battlefield and they have no Charge tokens. Remove 1 command token from them, then pick a slain friendly Grave Guard ({icon:minion}). Raise that fighter and place them in a starting hex in friendly territory. You can only use this ability once per game.

abilities.name: Surprise Swiftness
abilities.flavorText: Though their bodies are but mouldering bones, the power of the Tyrant's Crown - and their own revenant grief - grants Velmorn's line the occasional burst of swiftness.
abilities.rulesText: Use this in a Power step. Friendly fighters have +2 Move in the next turn. You can only use this ability once per game.
